sort.headerTitle: Sort: ascending, then descending, then default (database) order

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.validationDescription: Please enter a description (spaces alone are not enough).

exercises.imageHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF — one image

exercises.replaceFile: Replace: drop or choose a file.
exercises.importFailed: Import failed. Check the console for details.
exercises.importReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.

importErrors.invalidRow: One or more rows have the wrong number of columns.
importErrors.missingName: Every row must have a name (NOMBRE).
importErrors.missingDescription: Every row must have a description (DESCRIPCION).
importErrors.invalidRepType: Invalid rep type (TIPO_REPETICION). Use Repeticiones or Segundos.
importErrors.noRows: The CSV file has no exercise rows.
importErrors.duplicateNameInFile: The CSV contains duplicate exercise names.

exercises2.importCsvHint: Semicolon-separated CSV — use "/" to separate multiple values in Ages, Places, and Elements (spaces around "/" are ignored)

exercises2.importReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.

importErrors.invalidRow: One or more rows have the wrong number of columns.
importErrors.missingName: Every row must have a name (NOMBRE).
importErrors.missingDescription: Every row must have a description (DESCRIPCION).
importErrors.invalidAges: Invalid ages (EDADES). Provide at least one valid value, separated by "/".
importErrors.invalidPlaces: Invalid places (LUGARES). Provide at least one valid value, separated by "/".
importErrors.invalidElements: Invalid elements (ELEMENTOS). Use valid values separated by "/".
importErrors.noRows: The CSV file has no exercise rows.
importErrors.duplicateNameInFile: The CSV contains duplicate exercise names.

routines.title: Routines
routines.duplicateName: A routine with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
routines.saveFailed: Could not save the routine. Please try again.
routines.noDaysYet: No days yet. Use Create to add a row.
routines.finishEditingDay: Finish editing the day row in progress first
routines.saveBeforeAddDay: Save or remove the day row being edited before adding another
routines.submitHint: Save each day row or remove draft rows you do not need before {{action}} the routine.
routines.saveAllDaysTitle: Save all day rows before submitting
routines.blocksIncomplete: Each training block must have a name and a series. Complete or remove incomplete blocks for day {{day}}.
routines.exercisesIncomplete: Each exercise in a block must have an exercise and reps. Complete or remove incomplete rows for day {{day}}.
routines.importValidValuesIntro: Valid values for PERFIL, LUGAR, and PERIODO columns (first row, Spanish):
routines.importCsvHint: Comma- or semicolon-separated CSV — one file, one routine
routines.importFailed: Import failed. Check the console for details.
routines.importReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.

importErrors.invalidRow: One or more rows have the wrong number of columns.
importErrors.missingRoutineName: The first row must include the routine name (NOMBRE).
importErrors.duplicateRoutineName: A routine with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
importErrors.multipleRoutineNames: The CSV defines more than one routine name (NOMBRE).
importErrors.invalidPlayerType: Invalid player type (PERFIL). Use: Elite, Amateur, Juveniles, or Infantiles.
importErrors.invalidPlace: Invalid place (LUGAR). Use: Gimnasio, Plaza, Casa, or Cancha.
importErrors.invalidRoutineType: Invalid period (PERIODO). Use: Competencia or Pretemporada.
importErrors.invalidDay: Invalid day (DIA). Must be a positive integer.
importErrors.invalidBlockIndex: Invalid block (BLOQUE_N). Must be a positive integer.
importErrors.missingBlockName: Block name is required (BLOQUE_NOMBRE) when creating a new block.
importErrors.missingBlockSeries: Block series is required (BLOQUE_SERIES) when creating a new block.
importErrors.invalidExerciseIndex: Invalid exercise index (EJERCICIO_N). Must be a positive integer.
importErrors.missingExerciseName: Each row must include an exercise name (EJERCICIO_NOMBRE).
importErrors.exerciseNotFound: No exercise with that name was found in the database.
importErrors.duplicateExerciseIndexInBlock: Duplicate exercise indices in the same block.
importErrors.noRows: The CSV file has no data rows.
